title: grumilea subalpina
intro: Grumilea subalpina, also known as the mountain grumilea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Grumilea subalpina are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Grumilea subalpina can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
